title: Ticking Clock
goal: Chapter-by-chapter retention-risk heatmap with prioritized fixes

chapters.title: Crime
chapters.text: Suddenly everything changed. No one expected what came next. The truth was far stranger than the rumors. Who was behind the door? The inciting crime shocked the city. A ticking clock. The investigator found a clue. A red herring misled. Betrayal. Stakes escalation. The climax confrontation. Resolution. find out next.

chapters.title: Quiet
chapters.text: It was a calm, quiet morning. Peaceful memories. A gentle rest. He thought deeply, smiled softly. Comfort in the warmth. Nothing happened. He rested.

chapters.title: Heat
chapters.text: The battle raged. Blood and danger everywhere. The enemy attacked without warning. He barely escaped the trap. Desperate, racing against the deadline. Revenge burned. find out next what happened. The inciting crime shocked the city. A ticking clock. The investigator found a clue. A red herring misled. Betrayal. Stakes escalation. The climax confrontation. Resolution.

chapters.title: Slump
chapters.text: It was a calm, quiet morning. Peaceful memories. A gentle rest. He thought deeply, smiled softly. Comfort in the warmth. Nothing happened. nothing happened.

chapters.title: Reversal
chapters.text: But the truth changed everything. The real enemy was not what it seemed. Midpoint reversal: stakes escalated. The turning point shifted the war. The battle raged. Blood and danger everywhere. The enemy attacked without warning. He barely escaped the trap. Desperate, racing against the deadline. Revenge burned. find out next what happened.

chapters.title: Showdown
chapters.text: The final battle. Decisive climax showdown. The last stand against the dark lord. The ultimate confrontation. The end of the threat. The inciting crime shocked the city. A ticking clock. The investigator found a clue. A red herring misled. Betrayal. Stakes escalation. The climax confrontation. Resolution.

chapters.title: After
chapters.text: After the battle, the dust settled. Resolution at last. Returned home to a new normal. Epilogue. Peace returned.
